name: Address (Common Field)
summary: Reusable address field using the ADSP common schema $ref definition for postal address
whenToUse: Any form that collects a mailing or residential address
When you want structured address subfields (addressLine1, municipality, subdivisionCode, postalCode, country)
notes: Use the schemaDefinitionTool to load the common schema definitions first
The definition is `postalAddressAlberta` (for AB-only) or `postalAddressCanada` (all provinces)
Reference definitions with `$ref` — this renders structured address subfields automatically
Replace `yourAddressProperty` with a meaningful property name like `mailingAddress`
Subfields: addressLine1, addressLine2, municipality, subdivisionCode, postalCode, country
